title: Join Saber Group Team
subtitle: SABERGROUPSTUDIOS © For digital marketing services | design & media production house | web design & development services .
noPositionsDesc: There are no open positions at the moment. Please check back later for new opportunities.
applicationSubmittedDesc: Thank you for applying. We will review your application and contact you soon.
tagsHint: Press Enter or click Add button to add tags
requiredFieldEmptyAlert: You cannot leave this required field empty.
atLeastOneGroupEntryRequired: Please add at least one entry in this section and complete the required questions.
invalidPhotoType: Only JPG, JPEG, and PNG files are allowed
cvTooLarge: CV file size must be 10 MB or less
acceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions
submissionError: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
fixErrors: Please fix the errors in the form
inactiveJob: This position is no longer active
jobNotFoundDesc: The job position you are looking for does not exist
iAgree: I agree to the terms and conditions

terms.instructions: Please review and accept each term individually to proceed.

fixHintEmail: Enter a valid email address, for example name@example.com.
fixHintNumber: Enter numbers only (no letters or symbols).
fixHintUrl: Enter a full URL starting with http:// or https://.
fixHintDate: Choose a valid date that is not in the future.
fixHintSelection: Select one of the available options.
fixHintTags: Add at least one tag and press Enter or Add.
fixHintGroup: Complete all required fields in this section.
fixHintDefault: Review highlighted fields and provide valid values.
fixHintFullName: Enter your full name using letters and spaces only.
fixHintPhone: Enter an 11-digit Egyptian number starting with 010, 011, 012, or 015.
fixHintAddress: Enter a complete address with enough details.
fixHintSalary: Enter numbers only and keep the value within the allowed range.
fixHintPhoto: Upload a JPG or PNG photo up to 5 MB.
fixHintCv: Upload a PDF file up to 10 MB.
fixHintTerms: Accept all required terms and conditions to continue.
fixHintJobSpecs: Review the job specifications and update your response.
invalidSalary: Please enter a valid salary (numbers only)
checkStatusSubtitle: See whether you already submitted an application using your email and phone number.
checkStatusHint: Enter the same email and phone number you used in your previous application.
emailPhoneRequired: Please enter both email and phone number.
companyUnavailable: Company data is not available right now. Please try again shortly.
statusCheckFailed: Unable to check application status right now.
notAppliedYet: No previous application was found with this information.
